caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain, dark grey background. She wears a light green, patterned top with decorative embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom left and bottom center of the screen, a circular logo appears next to the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting slightly as she talks. Her posture remains steady, though her right arm begins to move slightly forward and upward towards the end of the clip. The lighting is consistent across the scene, focusing entirely on the subject as she delivers her presentation.
